body.class: home wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-8 wp-theme-feg-eu

div.class: navbar-nav d-none d-lg-flex mx-auto mb-2 mb-lg-0 d-flex justify-content-end w-100

ul.class: navbar-nav align-items-start me-auto mb-2 mb-md-0 menu

p.p:
We’ve been a star player in the betting and gaming industry since 1990.
Today, as FORTUNA ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, we provide top-tier
experiences for millions of customers, online,
on mobile, and in-store.

video.source: Your browser does not support the video tag.

div.class: col-12 col-md-12 col-lg-2 d-flex align-items-end mb-0 mb-md-3
col-12 col-md-3 mt-0 my-md-3 d-flex align-items-center flex-wrap flex-md-nowrap

section.class: what-we-do my-3 my-md-5 py-0 py-md-5 container-fluid container-fluid-padding

div.class: col-12 col-md-12 col-xl-6 col-xxl-5 my-3 my-md-3 px-0 px-md-3
div.p: We offer a world of gaming possibilities, from predicting football match goals to spinning virtual slot machines – there's something for everyone!

div.class: col-12 col-md-12 col-xl-6 col-xxl-7 my-3 my-md-3
col-12 col-xl-12 col-xxl-6 games my-3 my-md-4 px-0 px-md-4

img.alt: sports betting ,balls for playing basketball, football and billiards

div.p: Predicting and betting on a wide range of sports events, including pre-match and live-bet options.

div.class: col-12 col-xl-12 col-xxl-6 games my-3 my-md-4 px-0 px-md-4

div.p: Online lottery draws for a chance to win large jackpots. Our customers can also try their luck with online scratch cards.

div.class: col-12 col-xl-12 col-xxl-6 games my-3 my-md-4 px-0 px-md-4

img.alt: chips and cards for playing online casino

div.p: A variety of single and multiplayer table games, such as roulette and blackjack. In some markets, we also offer live dealer casino games.

div.class: col-12 col-xl-12 col-xxl-6 games my-3 my-md-4 px-0 px-md-4

div.p: 24/7 betting on simulated sports events, based on real-life sports.

div.class: col-12 games my-3 my-md-4 px-0 px-md-4

div.p:
A wide selection of online slots, including classic, video,
and progressive jackpot slots.

div.class: col-12 col-lg-12 col-xl-5 col-xxl-6 mb-xl-0 my-xxl-3 pb-xl-0 py-xxl-5
col-12 col-lg-12 col-xl-7 col-xxl-6 d-flex flex-column justify-content-center

div.p: We step up to the plate, taking responsibility for our actions and turning mistakes into valuable plays.
We embrace innovation and calculated risks, always aiming to break new ground and maintain our leading position in the game.
Our customers are our MVPs, and we’re dedicated to working hard so they can play smart.

div.class: col-12 d-flex justify-content-end p-3 p-md-3 p-lg-5 timeline-navigation fade-in-to-top
wrapper d-flex align-items-center me-0 me-md-5 radius-50

div.p: – FORTUNA is the first betting firm in Czechoslovakia.
– First branch opens in Prague.
– FORTUNA expands to Slovakia.
– FORTUNA expands to Poland.
– FORTUNA acquired by PENTA Investment Group.
– Launched online betting in Slovakia.
– Launched online betting in the Czech Republic.
– FORTUNA ENTERTAINMENT GROUP established.
– FORTUNA expands to Romania.
– Launched online gaming in the Czech Republic.
– Acquired Hattrick Sports Group.
– PSK Croatia, Casa Pariurilor Romania join FEG.
– Launched online gaming in Slovakia.
– Joined by Indian BI company Idea-Spark.
– New strategy and values introduced.
– Redesigned Sportsbook native apps.
– Launched first online scratch cards in CZ.
– Introduced Customer Care Chatbots for all brands.
– Community feature rollout for all brands.
– Marketing hub migration to Bloomreach.
– Redesigned Casino native apps.
– New Casino and Sport web platforms rollout for PSK.
– Modernized sports betting platform.
– Live Casino launch for RO and SK.
– Online Poker introduced in CZ.
– Withdrawals to payment cards for SK & CZ.
– Value-based Wheel Of Fortune released for CZ.
– Bet & Get promo for CZ, PL, and CRO.
– Server-side tracking pilot launch.
FEG acquires LOB
Headquartered in Podgorica, has been operating for more than 25 years and had developed a wide network of retail outlets and digital entertainment services across the country.
The company is recognized as Montenegro’s number 2 provide of sports prediction services and sports and gaming entertainment content.

section.class: container-fluid play-together bg-purple pb-5 position-relative overflow-hidden my-5

div.class: col-12 col-md-10 col-lg-6 col-xl-4 py-3 content-left
div.p: At FEG, we are firm believers that exceptional work and high-performing teams are driven by our company values: Accountable, Bold, and Customer Centric. If they resonate with you, we may be a good fit for each other.

p.p: We bring the fun and games to five European countries, with Business Intelligence operations based out of India.
